posts.author: BookWorm_Bella
posts.text: Finally tracked down a rare copy of 'The Silent Sea' at the local library in Westbridge! The librarian was so helpful and I couldn't resist adding it to my TBR pile. Can't wait to dive into this one this weekend. #bookhaul #westbridge
posts.explanation: This is a standard personal update about acquiring a book; it contains no harmful content, requests for private data, or policy violations.
